About.title: Less motivational talks. More building and connecting.
About.body: Born in November 2025 with the purpose of fueling the entrepreneurship and technology ecosystem in Guatemala. A community created from the need for high-value spaces.

visibility.title: Visibility
visibility.description: We spotlight the startups being built from Guatemala.

investment.title: Investment
investment.description: We connect investors with founders and startups in the ecosystem.

education.title: Education
education.description: We educate the ecosystem through events, resources, and real connections.

FinalCTA.title: Let's build together.
FinalCTA.subline: +600 builders, founders, and operators are already in the community. They're waiting for you.

CodeOfConduct.title: Code of conduct
CodeOfConduct.intro_body: Be the person who adds, not the one who takes away. At the502project we build a space where everyone feels safe, respected, and motivated to create. Treat others how you'd want to be treated: with respect, empathy, and professionalism.
CodeOfConduct.section1_body: At the502project we believe diversity makes us stronger. Regardless of your gender, race, sexual orientation, abilities, physical appearance, or beliefs. This is your space to learn, create, and grow.
CodeOfConduct.section2_title: We treat each other with respect
CodeOfConduct.section2_body: Whether at in-person events, on WhatsApp, or any other community channel, we aim for an environment of constructive collaboration. Differences of opinion are welcome, but we always express them with professionalism.
CodeOfConduct.section3_body: We do not accept any form of discrimination, harassment, intimidation, or behavior that makes anyone feel unsafe or unwelcome.
CodeOfConduct.forbidden_lang_2: Explicit sexual language or inappropriate content
CodeOfConduct.forbidden_lang_3: Violent content, threats, or intimidating language
CodeOfConduct.forbidden_harass_1: Harassment of any kind, in person or online
CodeOfConduct.forbidden_harass_2: Unwanted sexual attention or inappropriate advances
CodeOfConduct.report_title: Were you a victim or witness?
CodeOfConduct.report_body: Your safety and wellbeing are our priority. If you experience or witness any behavior that violates this code of conduct, contact the502project representatives immediately. Your report will be treated with confidentiality.

tiers.title: Three ways to build with us.
tiers.intro: Choose how you want to join. Each tier is a different way to partner with the community.

benefits.b1: Constant digital presence across the community's channels.

benefits.b1: Physical presence with a booth or activation at monthly events.
benefits.b2: Speaking time to deliver technical value to the audience.
benefits.b3: Access to the community's talent channel.

lead.name: Lead Partner
lead.audience: For leading brands and corporates seeking maximum presence.

benefits.b1: Maximum visibility across every digital and physical asset.
benefits.b3: Full access to the community's talent.

close.cta_title: Let's build the region's ecosystem, together.
close.cta_body: If you share the vision, let's talk. Tell us who you are and what you want to build.
close.note: Exclusive program. We choose carefully who we build with.

Labs.title: Labs
Labs.subline: Small sessions. Real building. Direct follow-up.
Labs.hero_open_teaser: Curated cohorts, open to builders in the community.
Labs.problem_p1: At the502project we run mass events. We fill rooms, gather a lot of people, bring great speakers, build community.
Labs.problem_p2: But there's something a large event can't deliver: personalized attention. Real time with people who've already built. Space for your question, not the average question.
Labs.principle_1_body: Intimate sessions. Everyone has room to participate.
Labs.principle_2_body: We're not here to listen. We're here to build.
Labs.principle_3_body: Each person gets the time and direction they need.
Labs.principle_4_body: Labs isn't for the curious. It's for builders.
Labs.open_p1: Cohorts designed by us, open to builders in the community. Each edition has a specific focus: building with AI, launching your first product, setting up infrastructure.
Labs.open_p2: Editions are announced by direct invitation to active builders. If you want to be on the radar for upcoming editions, leave us your email.
Labs.corporate_p1: Bring your team up to speed on AI before they fall behind. We design a Lab tailored to you: specific roadmap, personal attention, sessions built for your context across AI, building and product launches.
Labs.corporate_p2: It's not a generic workshop. It's a program built for your team and your goals.
Labs.facilitators_body: Each Lab is led by experts: builders and operators with proven track records, already shipping at the level you're aiming for. We don't bring speakers. We bring the people who've done the work.
Labs.status_body: Labs is in its first generation. Current editions run by direct invitation to selected builders. In 2026 we open public applications.
Labs.form_subtitle: If your profile fits the next edition, we'll reach out directly.
Labs.form_success_body: If your profile fits the next edition, we'll reach out directly.
Labs.form_error: Something failed. Try again in a moment.

LabsTerms.title: Terms and conditions
LabsTerms.intro: These apply to every edition of Labs (Open Labs, Corporate Labs, and future verticals). Read carefully. By confirming your seat in any edition, you accept these terms.
LabsTerms.section_1_body: These terms constitute an agreement between Nura Labs, an Individual Mercantile Company registered in the Mercantile Registry of the Republic of Guatemala, operator of The 502 Project brand (hereafter, The 502 Project), and the person or company who confirms a seat in an edition of Labs (hereafter, the participant). By completing payment, the participant accepts these terms in full.
LabsTerms.section_2_body: The investment for each edition of Labs is published explicitly before payment and processed through the secure payment gateway indicated for each edition. The price confirmed at the time of payment is the agreed price for that specific edition and is not subject to later change.
LabsTerms.section_3_body: No refunds are issued under any circumstance once payment is confirmed. The investment secures the participant's seat within the edition's curated places and covers session operations, digital materials, and benefits included in each format.
LabsTerms.section_4_body: If the participant does not attend the session on the scheduled date, no refund, credit, or rescheduling to a later edition applies. The reserved seat cannot be reassigned to another event or transferred to another cohort.
LabsTerms.section_5_body: The participant may transfer their seat to another person by notifying us at least 24 hours in advance through the indicated contact channel. The 502 Project reserves the right to approve the replacement in order to preserve the curation and profile of the cohort.
LabsTerms.section_6_title: Cancellation or rescheduling on our side
LabsTerms.section_6_body: The 502 Project may reschedule an edition. In case of rescheduling, the participant keeps their seat on the new date; if that date does not work for them, the seat is transferred to a later edition. Rescheduling does not entitle the participant to a refund. A 100% refund only applies if The 502 Project definitively cancels the edition with no possibility of rescheduling.
LabsTerms.section_7_body: All material, content, exercises, frameworks, templates, presentations, and discussions in Labs are the intellectual property of The 502 Project, its facilitators, or its partners. The participant may use what they learn in their own personal or professional projects, but may not record, transmit, or redistribute the session without explicit authorization; share specific Lab materials outside the cohort; or reproduce, replicate, or sell the Labs format as their own product.
LabsTerms.section_8_body: What each participant shares during the session stays within the cohort. Sessions are not recorded without the explicit consent of those present. The participant agrees to keep confidential any information voluntarily shared by other participants.
LabsTerms.section_9_body: The 502 Project's code of conduct applies, available at the502project.com/code-of-conduct. A violation of the code may result in immediate removal from the session or cohort, with no right to refund.
LabsTerms.section_10_body: The 502 Project may share general event photos on its public communication channels. If the participant prefers not to appear, they must notify us at the start of the session. The participant's personal data (name, email, occupation, what they are building) is processed by The 502 Project and used exclusively for Labs operations and public communications. It is not shared with third parties without consent.
LabsTerms.section_11_body: The 502 Project may update these terms for future editions; the version in effect at the time of payment is the one that applies to that participant. These terms are governed by the laws of the Republic of Guatemala.
LabsTerms.contact_body: If you have questions about these terms before confirming your seat, message me on WhatsApp.

AiBuild1.title: AI Build Lab #1
AiBuild1.subline: Build and ship your first AI tool in a guided four-hour session.
AiBuild1.invitation_p1: If you landed on this page, it's because you received the link directly.
AiBuild1.invitation_p2: AI Build Lab #1 is a private session. We're not promoting it publicly. We're inviting 15 specific people from the community, chosen with care, for the first edition of Labs.
AiBuild1.invitation_p3: Here's what we're going to do together.
AiBuild1.outcome_p1: You'll leave the session with a working tool.
AiBuild1.outcome_p2: Not a demo. Not a half-built prototype. Something that works, that you can show, that you can keep building afterward.
AiBuild1.outcome_p3: In 4 hours you'll use AI as leverage to build faster than you thought possible. You'll learn the criteria for deciding what to build, how to iterate, and when to cut. We don't teach tools. We teach you how to build.
AiBuild1.session_block_1: We start with quick context: what we're building and why this approach.
AiBuild1.session_block_2: Then we build. Most of the session is hands-on with direct support.
AiBuild1.session_block_3: We close with short demos: each person shows what they built.
AiBuild1.session_close: No long slides. No unnecessary theory. Real building, with support when you need it.
AiBuild1.why_you_p1: You weren't a name on a list. You were a decision.
AiBuild1.why_you_p2: You're among the top builders in the community. The ones who build, not just attend. Out of 600+ people in the502project, this first edition is for 15. One of them is you.
AiBuild1.filter_yes_1: You already build (or you're ready to start)
AiBuild1.filter_yes_2: You want criteria to use AI as real leverage
AiBuild1.filter_yes_3: You learn by doing, not by listening
AiBuild1.filter_yes_4: You're willing to leave with something shipped, not just notes
AiBuild1.filter_no_title: This is NOT for you if:
AiBuild1.filter_no_1: You're looking for a general intro to AI
AiBuild1.filter_no_2: You'd rather listen to a speaker panel
AiBuild1.filter_no_3: You don't intend to keep building afterward
AiBuild1.facilitator_credentials_1: Founder of the502project. Cursor Ambassador. Notion Ambassador.
AiBuild1.facilitator_extended_body: Founding AI Engineer at Finny, building product with AI full time. Official creator in the Cursor, Notion, and Firecrawl programs, where he publishes about applying AI to real building. With the502project he has curated events on technology, AI, and programming in Guatemala.
AiBuild1.transformation_before_1: You use AI as a user, not as a builder.
AiBuild1.transformation_before_2: You have ideas but get stuck on the implementation.
AiBuild1.transformation_before_3: You spend time configuring tools, not shipping.
AiBuild1.transformation_after_1: You use AI as leverage to build, not just to consume.
AiBuild1.transformation_after_2: You have criteria to decide what to build and when to cut.
AiBuild1.transformation_after_3: You know the flow from idea to working tool.
AiBuild1.includes_5: Permanent access to the cohort's private network
AiBuild1.details_note: We'll send the address by email once your seat is confirmed.
AiBuild1.cta_disclaimer: Secure payment via Recurrente. You'll get instant confirmation by email.
AiBuild1.cta_terms: By confirming, you agree to the Labs <link>terms and conditions</link>.
AiBuild1.closing_body: If you have questions before confirming, message me on WhatsApp. This is an invitation, not a funnel. I'd rather answer you myself.
AiBuild1.confirmed_next_p1: Within the next few hours, you'll get an email with the address, the agenda, and the link to the cohort's private group.
AiBuild1.confirmed_next_p2: If you don't see it within the day, check your spam folder. Any questions, message me on WhatsApp.
